spec_match.rationale: Outstanding conceptual exploration of complex multi-page layout print targets: :first, :left, and :right pseudo-classes matching modern CSS binding specifications.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive. Integrates both a multi-page strategy toggler and a slider, updating alternating gutter diagrams, real-time dimension readouts, and generated style rules.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Clean alignment detailing why publishers need variable margins for title cover sheets and spine binders.

edge_cases.rationale: Perfectly details the asymmetry of spine gutters in standard book publishing formats.

references.rationale: Correctly references ChromeStatus entry 5083275578875904 in the links section.

design_system.rationale: Superb multi-page design, using alternating margins and clear, readable text boxes.

summary: The multi-page-document is an exceptional, high-fidelity document spread simulation that shows the power of using env() margins with pseudo-page bindings.
